title: mapania debilis
intro: Mapania debilis, also known as the "slender mapania," is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant compounds. The health benefits of Mapania debilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to treat various ailments.
